headline: General Motors (GM) Valuation Check As IT Layoffs And Privacy Settlement Reshape Its Technology Focus
summary: General Motors (GM) is reshaping its information technology workforce, cutting more than 10% of roles while hiring for AI and data focused positions, as it settles a US$12.75 million California data privacy case. See our latest analysis for General Motors. GM’s recent IT layoffs and the California privacy settlement come after a period where short term share price momentum has cooled, with the 7 day share price return down 5% and the year to date share price return down 7.56%, while the 1...
